parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: $json.question, project_slug: $json.project_slug, session_id: $json.session_id, run_id: $json.trace?.run_id || null, correlation_id: $json.trace?.correlation_id || null }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const request = $('Normalize Demo Request').first().json;
const statusCode = $json.statusCode ?? 0;
const body = $json.body ?? {};
const sources = Array.isArray(body.sources) ? body.sources : [];
const selectedSources = Array.isArray(body.selected_sources) ? body.selected_sources : sources;
const retrievedCandidates = Array.isArray(body.retrieved_candidates) ? body.retrieved_candidates : [];
const grounding = body.grounding ?? {
  status: body.retrieval?.empty === true ? 'none' : 'weak',
  weak_grounding: body.retrieval?.empty !== false,
  note: body.retrieval?.empty === true ? 'No strong supporting memory was retrieved.' : 'Grounding details were not returned by the assistant workflow.',
  reasons: Array.isArray(body.trust?.uncertainty_reasons) ? body.trust.uncertainty_reasons : [],
  supporting_source_count: selectedSources.length,
  reviewed_source_count: Number(body.trust?.reviewed_source_count ?? 0),
  strongest_similarity: body.retrieval?.strongest_similarity ?? null,
  similarity_threshold: body.retrieval?.similarity_threshold ?? null,
  ranking_mode: body.trace?.ranking_mode ?? null,
  evidence_strength: body.trust?.evidence_strength ?? null,
  overall_trust_band: body.trust?.overall_band ?? null,
  primary_memory_ids: selectedSources.map((source) => source?.id).filter((value) => value !== null && value !== undefined),
  primary_chunk_indexes: selectedSources.map((source) => source?.chunk_index).filter((value) => Number.isInteger(value)),
};
const withStage = (trace, stage, status, extra = {}) => {
  const timestamp = new Date().toISOString();
  const errorCode = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_code') ? extra.error_code : (trace.error_code ?? null);
  const errorMessage = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(extra, 'error_message') ? extra.error_message : (trace.error_message ?? null);
  return {
    ...trace,
    ...extra,
    stage,
    status,
    error_code: errorCode,
    error_message: errorMessage,
    timestamp,
    stage_history: [
      ...(Array.isArray(trace.stage_history) ? trace.stage_history : []),
      { stage, status, timestamp, error_code: errorCode, error_message: errorMessage },
    ],
  };
};
const upstreamTrace = body.trace ?? null;
const workflowChain = ['crispybrain-demo', ...(Array.isArray(upstreamTrace?.workflow_chain) ? upstreamTrace.workflow_chain.filter((name) => name !== 'crispybrain-demo') : (upstreamTrace?.workflow_name ? [upstreamTrace.workflow_name] : []))];
const mergedTrace = withStage({
  ...(request.trace ?? {}),
  ...(upstreamTrace ?? {}),
  run_id: request.trace?.run_id ?? upstreamTrace?.run_id ?? null,
  correlation_id: request.trace?.correlation_id ?? upstreamTrace?.correlation_id ?? null,
  workflow_name: 'crispybrain-demo',
  project_slug: body.project_slug ?? request.project_slug,
  source_type: 'demo_request',
  workflow_chain: workflowChain,
}, 'assistant_result', statusCode >= 200 && statusCode < 300 ? 'accepted' : 'failed', {
  grounding_status: grounding.status,
  weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
  answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? null,
  conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
  conflict_severity: body.conflict_severity ?? null,
  claim_support_counts: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts) ? body.claim_support_counts : [],
  claim_support_counts_raw: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_raw) ? body.claim_support_counts_raw : [],
  claim_support_counts_deduped: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_deduped) ? body.claim_support_counts_deduped : [],
  claim_weighted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_weighted_support) ? body.claim_weighted_support : [],
  claim_independent_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independent_support) ? body.claim_independent_support : [],
  claim_independence_adjusted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independence_adjusted_support) ? body.claim_independence_adjusted_support : [],
  dominant_claim_status: body.dominant_claim_status ?? null,
  dominant_claim_basis: body.dominant_claim_basis ?? null,
  claim_confidence: body.claim_confidence ?? null,
  conflict_summary_hint: body.conflict_summary_hint ?? null,
  most_supported_claim: body.most_supported_claim ?? null,
  most_recent_claim: body.most_recent_claim ?? null,
  source_quality_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_quality_breakdown) ? body.source_quality_breakdown : [],
  source_independence_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_independence_breakdown) ? body.source_independence_breakdown : [],
  evidence_clusters: Array.isArray(body.evidence_clusters) ? body.evidence_clusters : [],
  entity_focus: body.entity_focus ?? null,
  filtered_candidate_count: Number(body.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
});
const debug = {
  workflow: 'crispybrain-demo',
  upstream_workflow: 'assistant',
  teacher_used: workflowChain.includes('answer-from-memory') || (typeof body.answer === 'string' && body.answer.trim() !== ''),
  retrieval_count: Number(body.retrieval?.memory_count ?? selectedSources.length ?? 0),
  defaulted_project_slug: request.defaulted_project_slug === true,
  session_id: body.session_id ?? request.session_id,
  upstream_status: statusCode || null,
  trace_stage: body.trace?.stage ?? mergedTrace.stage ?? null,
  grounding_status: grounding.status,
  weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
  supporting_source_count: grounding.supporting_source_count,
  reviewed_source_count: grounding.reviewed_source_count,
  grounding_note: grounding.note,
  answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? 'direct',
  conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
  conflict_severity: body.conflict_severity ?? null,
  claim_support_counts: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts) ? body.claim_support_counts : [],
  claim_support_counts_raw: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_raw) ? body.claim_support_counts_raw : [],
  claim_support_counts_deduped: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_deduped) ? body.claim_support_counts_deduped : [],
  claim_weighted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_weighted_support) ? body.claim_weighted_support : [],
  dominant_claim_status: body.dominant_claim_status ?? null,
  dominant_claim_basis: body.dominant_claim_basis ?? null,
  claim_confidence: body.claim_confidence ?? null,
  conflict_summary_hint: body.conflict_summary_hint ?? null,
  most_supported_claim: body.most_supported_claim ?? null,
  most_recent_claim: body.most_recent_claim ?? null,
  source_quality_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_quality_breakdown) ? body.source_quality_breakdown : [],
  entity_focus: body.entity_focus ?? null,
  filtered_candidate_count: Number(body.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
};
const operator = {
  inspection_tool_supported: true,
  health_summary_supported: true,
  suspect_export_supported: true,
  review_state_supported: true,
  deferred_operator_page: true,
  inspection_tool_hint: 'node scripts/inspect-crispybrain-memory.js --mode project-health --project-slug ' + (body.project_slug ?? request.project_slug),
  evaluation_pack_hint: './scripts/test-crispybrain-v0_9_5.sh',
};
if (statusCode < 200 || statusCode >= 300) {
  return [{
    json: {
      ok: false,
      question: request.question,
      project_slug: request.project_slug,
      answer: null,
      retrieval: body.retrieval ?? null,
      trust: body.trust ?? null,
      grounding,
      sources: [],
      selected_sources: [],
      retrieved_candidates: [],
      answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? 'insufficient',
      conflict_flag: false,
      conflict_severity: null,
      conflict_details: [],
      claim_support_counts: [],
      claim_support_counts_raw: [],
      claim_support_counts_deduped: [],
      claim_weighted_support: [],
      claim_independent_support: [],
      claim_independence_adjusted_support: [],
      dominant_claim_status: null,
      dominant_claim_basis: null,
      claim_confidence: null,
      conflict_summary_hint: null,
      most_supported_claim: null,
      most_recent_claim: null,
      source_quality_breakdown: [],
      source_independence_breakdown: [],
      evidence_clusters: [],
      entity_focus: body.entity_focus ?? null,
      filtered_candidate_count: Number(body.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
      operator,
      error: {
        code: 'UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR',
        message: 'The CrispyBrain demo workflow could not reach the assistant path successfully.',
        status: statusCode || null,
        classification: 'transient',
        retryable: true,
      },
      debug,
      trace: withStage(mergedTrace, 'upstream_http_error', 'failed', {
        error_code: 'UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR',
        error_message: 'The CrispyBrain demo workflow could not reach the assistant path successfully.',
        grounding_status: grounding.status,
        weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
        answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? null,
        conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
      }),
    },
  }];
}
if (body.ok !== true) {
  return [{
    json: {
      ok: false,
      question: request.question,
      project_slug: request.project_slug,
      answer: typeof body.answer === 'string' && body.answer.trim() ? body.answer : null,
      retrieval: body.retrieval ?? null,
      trust: body.trust ?? null,
      grounding,
      sources,
      selected_sources: selectedSources,
      retrieved_candidates: retrievedCandidates,
      answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? 'direct',
      conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
      conflict_severity: body.conflict_severity ?? null,
      conflict_details: Array.isArray(body.conflict_details) ? body.conflict_details : [],
      claim_support_counts: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts) ? body.claim_support_counts : [],
      claim_support_counts_raw: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_raw) ? body.claim_support_counts_raw : [],
      claim_support_counts_deduped: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_deduped) ? body.claim_support_counts_deduped : [],
      claim_weighted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_weighted_support) ? body.claim_weighted_support : [],
      claim_independent_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independent_support) ? body.claim_independent_support : [],
      claim_independence_adjusted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independence_adjusted_support) ? body.claim_independence_adjusted_support : [],
      dominant_claim_status: body.dominant_claim_status ?? null,
      dominant_claim_basis: body.dominant_claim_basis ?? null,
      claim_confidence: body.claim_confidence ?? null,
      conflict_summary_hint: body.conflict_summary_hint ?? null,
      most_supported_claim: body.most_supported_claim ?? null,
      most_recent_claim: body.most_recent_claim ?? null,
      source_quality_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_quality_breakdown) ? body.source_quality_breakdown : [],
      source_independence_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_independence_breakdown) ? body.source_independence_breakdown : [],
      evidence_clusters: Array.isArray(body.evidence_clusters) ? body.evidence_clusters : [],
      entity_focus: body.entity_focus ?? null,
      filtered_candidate_count: Number(body.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
      operator,
      error: body.error ?? {
        code: 'UPSTREAM_DEMO_FAILURE',
        message: 'The CrispyBrain assistant did not return a successful answer.',
        classification: 'upstream',
        retryable: false,
      },
      debug: { ...debug, retrieval_empty: body.retrieval?.empty === true },
      trace: withStage(mergedTrace, 'demo_failed', 'failed', {
        error_code: body.error?.code ?? 'UPSTREAM_DEMO_FAILURE',
        error_message: body.error?.message ?? 'The CrispyBrain assistant did not return a successful answer.',
        grounding_status: grounding.status,
        weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
        answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? null,
        conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
      }),
    },
  }];
}
return [{
  json: {
    ok: true,
    question: request.question,
    project_slug: body.project_slug ?? request.project_slug,
    answer: body.answer,
    retrieval: body.retrieval ?? null,
    trust: body.trust ?? null,
    grounding,
    sources,
    selected_sources: selectedSources,
    retrieved_candidates: retrievedCandidates,
    answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? 'direct',
    conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
    conflict_severity: body.conflict_severity ?? null,
    conflict_details: Array.isArray(body.conflict_details) ? body.conflict_details : [],
    claim_support_counts: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts) ? body.claim_support_counts : [],
    claim_support_counts_raw: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_raw) ? body.claim_support_counts_raw : [],
    claim_support_counts_deduped: Array.isArray(body.claim_support_counts_deduped) ? body.claim_support_counts_deduped : [],
    claim_weighted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_weighted_support) ? body.claim_weighted_support : [],
    claim_independent_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independent_support) ? body.claim_independent_support : [],
    claim_independence_adjusted_support: Array.isArray(body.claim_independence_adjusted_support) ? body.claim_independence_adjusted_support : [],
    dominant_claim_status: body.dominant_claim_status ?? null,
    dominant_claim_basis: body.dominant_claim_basis ?? null,
    claim_confidence: body.claim_confidence ?? null,
    conflict_summary_hint: body.conflict_summary_hint ?? null,
    most_supported_claim: body.most_supported_claim ?? null,
    most_recent_claim: body.most_recent_claim ?? null,
    source_quality_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_quality_breakdown) ? body.source_quality_breakdown : [],
    source_independence_breakdown: Array.isArray(body.source_independence_breakdown) ? body.source_independence_breakdown : [],
    evidence_clusters: Array.isArray(body.evidence_clusters) ? body.evidence_clusters : [],
    entity_focus: body.entity_focus ?? null,
    filtered_candidate_count: Number(body.filtered_candidate_count ?? 0),
    operator,
    debug,
    trace: withStage(mergedTrace, 'demo_response_ready', 'succeeded', {
      grounding_status: grounding.status,
      weak_grounding: grounding.weak_grounding,
      answer_mode: body.answer_mode ?? null,
      conflict_flag: body.conflict_flag === true,
    }),
  },
}];
